title: Raccoon Removal in NoLIta | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in NoLIta, Manhattan. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Serving historic buildings & lofts. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Raccoons invading your NoLIta property can cause serious damage to rooftops, chimneys, and historic building structures. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert raccoon removal services throughout NoLIta, from Kenmare Street to Houston Street, protecting residential lofts and commercial spaces alike. Our humane trapping and exclusion methods ensure raccoons are safely removed and won't return.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in raccoon removal for NoLIta's unique mix of historic cast-iron buildings and modern residences. Our experienced technicians understand the structural challenges of the neighborhood and provide discreet, effective service with guaranteed results.
localContext: NoLIta's charming low-rise buildings, trendy boutiques along Mulberry and Mott Streets, and proximity to parks make it susceptible to raccoon activity, especially near restaurant areas and older rooflines. The neighborhood's dense architecture and limited attic access require specialized expertise to effectively remove raccoons without damaging historic features.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in NoLIta?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in NoLIta typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and any damage repair needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning work.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons common in NoLIta buildings?
faqs.answer: NoLIta's combination of older buildings with accessible rooflines, abundant food sources from restaurants and cafes, and proximity to green spaces make it attractive to raccoons. They often enter through chimneys, roof vents, or gaps in historic masonry seeking warm shelter, especially during breeding season.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my NoLIta property?
faqs.answer: Most raccoon removals in NoLIta take 3-7 days from initial trapping to complete exclusion. The timeline depends on the number of animals, whether babies are present, and the complexity of sealing entry points. We offer emergency same-day inspections for urgent situations.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal safe for historic NoLIta buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, our technicians are experienced in working with NoLIta's historic cast-iron and brick buildings. We use non-invasive methods that protect architectural integrity while effectively removing raccoons and sealing entry points. All exclusion work is done carefully to preserve the character of your property.
